### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Replay](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Replay')

## AggregateReconstructionErrorCategory Enum

Categorical classification of aggregate replay failures\. Used for ProblemDetails
mapping in the Admin replay surface and for operator\-facing diagnostics\.

```csharp
public enum AggregateReconstructionErrorCategory
```
### Fields

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionErrorCategory.None'></a>

`None` 0

No error\. Pairs with [Succeeded](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionStatus.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionStatus.Succeeded 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Replay\.AggregateReconstructionStatus\.Succeeded')\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionErrorCategory.UnknownAggregateType'></a>

`UnknownAggregateType` 1

The requested aggregate type or domain has no registered owner\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionErrorCategory.UnknownEventType'></a>

`UnknownEventType` 2

An event type name in the stream was not recognized by the domain\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionErrorCategory.DeserializationFailed'></a>

`DeserializationFailed` 3

An event payload could not be deserialized to the expected CLR type\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionErrorCategory.ApplyHandlerMissing'></a>

`ApplyHandlerMissing` 4

The state type has no public Apply method for an event in the stream\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionErrorCategory.ApplyFailed'></a>

`ApplyFailed` 5

Apply executed but threw\. The state up to [LastAppliedSequenceNumber](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionResult.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionResult.LastAppliedSequenceNumber 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Replay\.AggregateReconstructionResult\.LastAppliedSequenceNumber') is preserved\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionErrorCategory.UnsupportedVersion'></a>

`UnsupportedVersion` 6

The stored event version is not supported by the registered Apply path\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionErrorCategory.Unexpected'></a>

`Unexpected` 7

Any failure that does not match a more specific category\.
